methodology.statistical_strength: Descriptive only: contrasts between easy vs hard subsets; small-n; not hypothesis-tested.
methodology.difficulty_rule: easy: both feasible; hard: neither feasible; moderate: exactly one feasible
methodology.solver_pair_per_instance: one CP-SAT + one hybrid run per scenario seed (not repeated trials)

features.symmetry_note: candidate_count_cv captures imbalance across items; degenerate duplicate placements not enumerated
